metadata.source: AfEONet Report 2025 - Eyes on the Ballot Watchers
metadata.author: Abel Eseru
metadata.note: Alerts extracted from the report. Update with exact dates from AfEONet team.

alerts.title: Mass Arrests of Election Observers in Uganda
alerts.description: 27 election observers detained in January 2025. Mass arrests of observers, violent crackdowns.

alerts.title: Police Raids on Observer Offices in Zimbabwe
alerts.description: Police raided offices of the Zimbabwe Election Support Network. Equipment seized.

alerts.title: Digital Transparency Tools Under Threat in Nigeria
alerts.description: IReV portal access restricted. Technical limitations on election data access.

alerts.title: Fragile Environment for Observers in South Sudan
alerts.description: Hostile environment for observers. Limited civic space due to ongoing conflict.

alerts.title: Military Transition Blocks Observer Access in Chad
alerts.description: Military transition creating hostile environment. Restrictions on civic space.

alerts.title: Closed Civic Space in Congo Brazzaville
alerts.description: Virtually nonexistent civic space. Complete closure of observer operations.

alerts.title: Reforming but Constraints Persist in Ethiopia
alerts.description: Reforming civic space but ongoing political and operational constraints.

alerts.title: Restrictive Accreditation Procedures in Tanzania
alerts.description: Restrictive accreditation procedures limiting observer access.

alerts.title: Fragility and External Dependence in Somalia
alerts.description: Civic space under strain from fragility and external dependence.

alerts.title: Political Filtering of Civic Space in Cameroon
alerts.description: Selective openness favoring pro-government observers. Independent groups face accreditation delays.

alerts.title: Constrained Civic Space in Eswatini
alerts.description: Public legitimacy amid constrained civic space for election observation.

alerts.title: Sustainability Pressures in South Africa
alerts.description: Robust civic space confronting sustainability pressures. Funding challenges.
